title: SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST allows duration_days=0, producing immediately-expired invoice
description: ws.rs SUBSCRIBE_REQUEST: params.duration_days is a u32. The cap check rejects values above max_days but does not reject 0. A client sending duration_days=0 gets an invoice with expires_at=now, which is immediately expired. The payment watcher looks up the invoice via get_invoice_by_address which filters WHERE expires_at > datetime('now') — so the invoice is unfindable the moment it is created, and the payment can never be fulfilled even if the client pays. Fix: add a minimum check: duration_days >= 1.
